pageContext.name: Iron Man
pageContext.description: My armor is maneuverable, fast, and lots of fun at parties.   Sideshow presents the Iron Man Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle, a Marvel art print celebrating the innovation and genius of Tony Stark.  Showcasing the power and prestige of his futuristic tech, Iron Man raises his repulsors and invites the viewer to inspect his greatest hits. This colorful composition includes the hero's name displayed in gold letters to match his bright yellow and hot-rod red suit. Behind Tony, his Hall of Armor is on full display so that we can see every bit of tinkering and upgrading he's achieved over the years. Featured in the topmost part of his workshop is Iron Man Mark I, paying homage to Tony's origins.  Each Iron Man Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This vibrant art is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 400 pieces.  Put a suit of armor around your Marvel collection when you bring home the Iron Man Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle today!
